question_text: Which of the following devices converts energy most efficiently?

options.label: A
options.text: An incandescent light bulb that converts 95% of energy to heat and only 5% to light

options.label: B
options.text: A diesel engine that converts 35% of fuel energy into useful mechanical work

options.label: C
options.text: An electric motor that converts 85% of electrical energy into useful mechanical work

options.label: D
options.text: A solar panel that converts 50% of solar energy into electrical energy

explanation: The electric motor has the highest efficiency at 85%. This is a hard question because it requires comparing four different real-world devices and understanding that higher efficiency means more useful energy output relative to total input. Students must evaluate which percentage represents the best conversion of input to useful output.
